$comment: id -> { photo, credit }. Optional real photos for the herping reveal card. Populated by scripts/fetch-herping-photos.mjs (CC-licensed, with attribution). If a photo fails to load the card falls back to the pixel sprite, so partial coverage is fine. `photo` may be an iNaturalist URL or a hobby-media blob URL.
